untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting when a 40-day moving average trendline 'turns up' (direction change), which cannot be expressed as a single comparison operator condition without historical slope calculation. Additionally, 20-day standard deviation is not in the allowed indicators list; hvol_20 (20-day historical volatility) is used as the closest approximation. The exact threshold 'above 3 standard deviations' cannot be precisely quantified without the raw standard deviation indicator.
translation_notes: Used hvol_20 as proxy for 20-day volatility measure. Set threshold at 0.03 (3% decimal equivalent) as conservative interpretation of '3 standard deviations' threshold. The trendline 'turn' condition requires slope detection beyond simple crossing logic. For practical implementation, consider using prev_close comparisons or ADX_14 > threshold to confirm trend direction change.
